front.title: A Well-Known URI for API Change Advisories

abstract.t: This document defines a well-known URI, /.well-known/api- advisory.json, at which API providers MAY publish a machine-readable JSON discovery file. That file identifies the API and provides the URL of an Atom Syndication Format feed carrying structured change advisories. The Atom feed enables automated scanners and API consumers to discover pricing changes, deprecations, security advisories, and other relevant events without relying on manual monitoring of blogs or mailing lists. Advisory metadata is conveyed through a dedicated XML namespace defined in this document.
